title: erysimum sylvestre subsp. aurantiacum
intro: Erysimum sylvestre subsp. aurantiacum, also known as the wallflower, is a flowering plant belonging to the Brassicaceae family, commonly found in the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Erysimum sylvestre subsp. aurantiacum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which are used to harness its medicinal properties for various health applications.
